summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ATOM app rebranding. Successfully verified ATOM branding replacement, blue/purple color scheme, mobile responsiveness, user flows, and workspace functionality. All core rebranding objectives achieved.

integration_issues.issue: User gets logged out intermittently when navigating between workspace panels

design_issues.issue: Made with Emergent badge elements still exist in DOM but properly hidden with CSS
design_issues.note: Elements are correctly hidden with visibility:hidden, opacity:0, display settings - working as intended

passed_tests: Landing page loads with ATOM branding (not Forge)
Blue/purple color scheme properly applied throughout UI
Desktop sidebar navigation with 6 icons present
Mobile bottom navigation with all 5 panels accessible
Made with Emergent badge properly hidden
ATOM logo and branding consistent across all pages
Navigation buttons functional on both desktop and mobile
Gradient buttons working with blue/purple theme
Authentication flows redirect properly to workspace

medium_priority: Investigate workspace session persistence issue - users getting logged out when switching between panels
low_priority: Consider removing Emergent badge DOM elements entirely instead of just hiding them with CSS
